'''dhowachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:measley|measley]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-w-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:measley|measley]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhowachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhowachithi|dhowachithi]] || [[word:dhowachiji|dhowachiji]] || [[word:dhowachishi|dhowachishi]] || [[word:dhowachiki|dhowachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhowachuthuthu|dhowachuthuthu]] || [[word:dhowachujuju|dhowachujuju]] || [[word:dhowachushushu|dhowachushushu]] || [[word:dhowachukuku|dhowachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhowachuthu|dhowachuthu]] || [[word:dhowachuju|dhowachuju]] || [[word:dhowachushu|dhowachushu]] || [[word:dhowachuku|dhowachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhowachufthuf|dhowachufthuf]] || [[word:dhowachufjuf|dhowachufjuf]] || [[word:dhowachufshuf|dhowachufshuf]] || [[word:dhowachufkuf|dhowachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhowachethe|dhowachethe]] || [[word:dhowacheje|dhowacheje]] || [[word:dhowacheshe|dhowacheshe]] || [[word:dhowacheke|dhowacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhowachothotho|dhowachothotho]] || [[word:dhowachojojo|dhowachojojo]] || [[word:dhowachoshosho|dhowachoshosho]] || [[word:dhowachokoko|dhowachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhowachotho|dhowachotho]] || [[word:dhowachojo|dhowachojo]] || [[word:dhowachosho|dhowachosho]] || [[word:dhowachoko|dhowachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhowachofthof|dhowachofthof]] || [[word:dhowachofjof|dhowachofjof]] || [[word:dhowachofshof|dhowachofshof]] || [[word:dhowachofkof|dhowachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhowachĂŻfthĂŻf|dhowachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhowachĂŻfjĂŻf|dhowachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhowachĂŻfshĂŻf|dhowachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhowachĂŻfkĂŻf|dhowachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhowachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhowachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhowachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhowachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhowachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhowachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhowachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhowachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhowachĂŻfthĂŻf|dhowachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhowachĂŻfjĂŻf|dhowachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhowachĂŻfshĂŻf|dhowachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhowachĂŻfkĂŻf|dhowachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhowachĂŻfthĂŻf|dhowachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhowachĂŻfjĂŻf|dhowachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhowachĂŻfshĂŻf|dhowachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhowachĂŻfkĂŻf|dhowachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhowachĂŠthĂŠ|dhowachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhowachĂŠjĂŠ|dhowachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhowachĂŠshĂŠ|dhowachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhowachĂŠkĂŠ|dhowachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhowachathatha|dhowachathatha]] || [[word:dhowachajaja|dhowachajaja]] || [[word:dhowachashasha|dhowachashasha]] || [[word:dhowachakaka|dhowachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhowachatha|dhowachatha]] || [[word:dhowachaja|dhowachaja]] || [[word:dhowachasha|dhowachasha]] || [[word:dhowachaka|dhowachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhowachafthaf|dhowachafthaf]] || [[word:dhowachafjaf|dhowachafjaf]] || [[word:dhowachafshaf|dhowachafshaf]] || [[word:dhowachafkaf|dhowachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhowachasha|dhowachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhowachshĂ«sha|dhowachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhowachrosha|dhowachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhowachmusha|dhowachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhowachyasha|dhowachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhowachnkshĂ«sha|godhowachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhowachnkrosha|godhowachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhowachnkmusha|godhowachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhowachnkyasha|godhowachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhowawachasha|dhowawachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhowawachshĂ«sha|dhowawachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhowawachrosha|dhowawachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhowawachmusha|dhowawachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhowawachyasha|dhowawachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhowawachnkshĂ«sha|godhowawachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhowawachnkrosha|godhowawachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhowawachnkmusha|godhowawachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhowawachnkyasha|godhowawachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhewĂŠchasha|dhewĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhewĂŠchshĂ«sha|dhewĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhewĂŠchrosha|dhewĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhewĂŠchmusha|dhewĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhewĂŠchyasha|dhewĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhewĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|godhewĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhewĂŠchnkrosha|godhewĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhewĂŠchnkmusha|godhewĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhewĂŠchnkyasha|godhewĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhowfachasha|dhowfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhowfachshĂ«sha|dhowfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhowfachrosha|dhowfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhowfachmusha|dhowfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhowfachyasha|dhowfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhowfachnkshĂ«sha|godhowfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhowfachnkrosha|godhowfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhowfachnkmusha|godhowfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhowfachnkyasha|godhowfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
